title: AGI is FAKE: The Biggest AI Lie Exposed
summary: A critical video arguing that AGI predictions are overhyped and mathematically impossible given transformer architecture limits. The creator uses the Time Hierarchy Theorem and chain-of-thought limitations to claim that current AI models have a fundamental ceiling that cannot be overcome by scaling alone.
